programme.title: The Getaway Car
programme.desc: Nick and Malina combine heroics with beauty, but will it get them to the final?

programme.title: The Getaway Car
programme.desc: Hosts review cars and take on extreme challenges, road trips, and high-speed tests across the world. They combine automotive journalism with humor, stunts, and competitive segments in unique environments. Exotic vehicles, celebrity guests, and outrageous experiments drive entertainment and unpredictable outcomes.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode
programme.desc: Hosts review cars and take on extreme challenges, road trips, and high-speed tests across the world. They combine automotive journalism with humor, stunts, and competitive segments in unique environments. Exotic vehicles, celebrity guests, and outrageous experiments drive entertainment and unpredictable outcomes.

programme.title: The Getaway Car
programme.desc: Can Suzie and Mark overcome their 'dumb and dumber' handicap to strive for glory?

They combine automotive journalism with humor, stunts, and competitive segments in unique environments. Exotic vehicles, celebrity guests, and outrageous experiments drive entertainment and unpredictable outcomes.
